trades.reasoning: Highest score (95) with RSI 62.4 in the ideal bullish momentum zone — not overbought — with MACD crossover and rising histogram confirming accelerating upside in a risk-on session.
Score 90 with RSI 63.6 in the bullish zone (not overbought), MACD bullish crossover, and price well above SMA-20 — semiconductor/AI leadership makes this a strong risk-on addition.

decisions.briefing: Markets are clearly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.6% and S&P 500 up 1.2%, favouring growth and tech. With 5 open slots and $598 in cash, I'm deploying into TSLA and NVDA — the only two top candidates with RSIs still in the healthy bullish zone (60–65) rather than deeply overbought territory above 80. The rest of the screener is crowded with RSI readings above 80, which signals late-stage momentum and elevated mean-reversion risk; TSLA and NVDA offer the best reward-to-risk on this list right now.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly today, with the NASDAQ leading at +1.6% and the S&P 500 gaining +1.2%, reflecting a clear risk-on mood among investors. Technology and growth names drove the advance as market participants rotated into higher-beta assets, consistent with improving macro sentiment around trade negotiations and resilient corporate earnings. The breadth of the rally — spanning semiconductors, EVs, and speculative small-caps — signals that institutional money is actively putting cash to work rather than sitting on the sidelines.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面反彈，那斯達克指數領漲1.6%，標普500亦上揚1.2%，市場呈現明顯的風險偏好情緒。科技與成長股帶頭上攻，反映投資人對貿易談判進展及企業盈利前景的樂觀預期，資金積極從防禦性資產轉向高貝塔值標的。半導體、電動車及小型投機股全線走強，顯示機構資金正積極部署，而非按兵不動觀望。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast and how much a stock has moved recently, on a scale of 0 to 100. A reading between 55–70 is considered a 'bullish momentum zone' — the stock is trending up but still has room to run. Above 70 (and especially above 80) signals 'overbought' conditions, meaning the move may be exhausted and a pullback is likely. Today, most screener candidates had RSIs above 80, making TSLA (62.4) and NVDA (63.6) the standout picks — strong momentum without the snap-back risk.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價近期漲跌的速度與幅度，數值介於0至100之間。RSI落在55至70之間為「強勢動能區間」，代表股價處於上升趨勢且仍有上漲空間。一旦超過70（尤其是80以上），則進入「超買區間」，意味著漲勢可能過熱，回調風險升高。今日大多數候選股RSI均超過80，因此RSI分別為62.4的特斯拉與63.6的輝達成為最佳切入點——兼具上漲動能，又不帶超買後的急跌風險。
